name: Button
description: Primary interactive element. Platform-neutral spec — implement per target stack against these contracts.

release.rationale: Visual analog of the haptic confirmation tap. Required because iOS silences every haptic API (UIImpactFeedbackGenerator, .sensoryFeedback, CHHapticEngine even with playsHapticsOnly = true, AudioServicesPlaySystemSound) while an AVAudioEngine is mid-recording in .playAndRecord — and the walkthrough's primary CTA (Weiter) is tapped during exactly that state. The flash fires on press-release so it always confirms 'tap registered', regardless of audio session state.

platformNotes.web: Implement as headless component (React/Vue/Svelte). See app/components/DS/button.rb for original Rails ViewComponent.
platformNotes.swiftui: Implement as ButtonStyle. Map height to .frame(height:), use DSColor + DSMetrics. Apply .sensoryFeedback(.selection, trigger:) for haptics on iOS 17+.
platformNotes.uikit: Subclass UIButton.Configuration; map sizes via .contentInsets and .preferredFont.
